name: seqwalk
description: Walk through AI-written code with interactive HTML sequence diagrams.

interface.shortDescription: Review code flow with interactive HTML sequence diagrams.
interface.longDescription: SeqWalk packages a Claude Code skill for generating browser-validated sequence-diagram walkthroughs of AI-written or AI-modified code. If it saves you time, please buy the maintainer a coffee through the support section in the repository.
defaultPrompt: Use SeqWalk to diagram this code flow.
Create an interactive HTML sequence diagram.
Review this AI-written flow with SeqWalk.
